Environmental Protection.summary: Lankford has consistently opposed federal environmental regulations and voted against climate-focused legislation.
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act with climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)
Methane emissions fee provisions (Senate vote, 2022)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Lankford has supported bipartisan criminal justice reform efforts including sentencing reform.

Progressive Taxation.summary: Lankford opposes tax increases on corporations and high earners, supporting tax cuts.
voted_for: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (Senate vote, December 2017)
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act tax provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Lankford has consistently opposed abortion rights and supported restrictions.
voted_for: Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Act (Senate vote, January 2018)
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Lankford has opposed LGBTQ+ rights legislation including marriage equality protections.
voted_against: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)

Environmental Protection.summary: Hern has opposed climate legislation and environmental regulations, focusing on energy independence.
voted_against: Build Back Better Act with climate provisions (House vote, November 2021)
Inflation Reduction Act (House vote, August 2022)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Hern opposes increased taxation on corporations and wealthy individuals, supporting tax cuts.
voted_for: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act extension proposals (2023)
voted_against: Build Back Better Act tax provisions (House vote, November 2021)

Cannabis Policy.summary: Hern has opposed federal cannabis legalization efforts.
voted_against: MORE Act for cannabis decriminalization (House vote, April 2022)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Hern has consistently voted against abortion rights legislation.
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (House vote, September 2021)

Public School Funding.summary: Hern has supported some education funding while opposing federal education mandates.
voted_for: Various appropriations bills with education funding (2021-2023)
